channel.title: Thriving Dancer Podcast
channel.description: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.
channel.itunes:author: Thriving Dancer
channel.itunes:summary: Audio-first practice, interview, and reflection episodes for the Thriving Dancer system.

item.title: Picking Up Choreography More Quickly — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
Dance and Dancing form the clearest practical thread here.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-more-quickly-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html

item.title: Intro for restorative yoga — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
A gentle restorative practice framed around releasing tension, softening the nervous system, and settling back into a steadier rhythm.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/intro-for-restorative-yoga-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ehnbRR83CPU

item.title: Dave's Gone By interview — Jay Handelman and Carrie Seidman — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
A focused look at shrinking local arts coverage, why criticism still matters, and how nonprofit reporting might keep that work alive.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dave-s-gone-by-interview-jay-handelman-and-carrie-seidman-interview-note.html

item.title: Dance Podcast — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
A process-focused piece about improvisation, projections, and choreographing together inside a shifting group workflow.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/dance-podcast-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bqn7LtqZ_4I

item.title: Clone Dance Party: Local Arts Coverage and Why Criticism Still Matters
item.description:
A focused look at shrinking local arts coverage, why criticism still matters, and how nonprofit reporting might keep that work alive.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/clone-dance-party-local-arts-coverage-and-why-criticism-still-matters.html

item.title: bliptv-20131014-110547-Cgbenzine-DanceDanceDanceDance715 — review-first source hold
item.description:
Podcast-video source held in review-first mode. Theme extraction is dominated by novelty/joke terms instead of reusable editorial ideas.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/bliptv-20131014-110547-cgbenzine-dancedancedancedance715-review-first-so.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YwxBlVFHLAA

item.title: Success without stress — review-first source hold
item.description:
Podcast-audio source held in review-first mode. Very few informative transcript sentences survived filtering.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/success-without-stress-review-first-source-hold.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XofzFfRmmlQ

item.title: Heather Robles interview 2 — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
Building an independent dance practice and company over time and Travel and work across places shaped the dance perspective in the source form the clearest practical thread here.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/heather-robles-interview-2-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html

item.title: Me Behind This Exuberant Dance Number Planning, Precision, and Practice — interview notes and takeaways
item.description:
How La La Land blends old-musical energy with modern choreography and Mandy Moore’s choreography process and creative leadership form the clearest practical thread here.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/me-behind-this-exuberant-dance-number-planning-precision-and-practice-in.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XAxv2KdYmOg

item.title: Picking Up Choreography After Years of Salsa
item.description:
A practical look at how previous dance experience can speed up learning new choreography.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/picking-up-choreography-after-years-of-salsa.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tIdRycWZkPE

item.title: Heartbeat Podcast Lane Smoke — Interview Notes and Takeaways
item.description:
This is a short calm audio-only smoke test for the podcast-first lane. It should create an article, a podcast episode destination, an email handoff, and a YouTube support path without needing a manual destination override.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/heartbeat-podcast-lane-smoke-interview-notes-and-takeaways.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T_nMZXBHlNE

item.title: Intro for Restorative Yoga
item.description:
This practice is designed to help your body and mind release the weight of the day, to soften the tension you've been holding and reconnect to a steady peaceful rhythm within. We'll move gently using supportive props and longer holds to invite the nervous system into balance. Hi friends, and welcome to Devanna Yoga and Wellness.
Companion article: https://origin4124.github.io/thriving-dancer-review-pages/content-hub-review/intro-for-restorative-yoga.html
YouTube listen destination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iRqMil7nfQ4
